coach_notes: To build a strong finance career, focus on mastering financial reporting, reconciliation, and month-end close—these are core to most finance roles. Start by taking online courses in accounting fundamentals and practicing with real-world scenarios, like reconciling sample ledgers. You already have a solid foundation in business analysis, so leverage that to quickly grasp these missing skills—you're on the right track!
